allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add AI-powered product search feature with complete mobile UI

This commit implements a comprehensive AI-powered product search system that allows users to describe products in natural language and receive curated results from multiple sources.

## Backend Implementation

### Database Layer
- Add migration with 5 new tables: products, search_queries, product_filters, mcp_server_configs, ai_processing_logs
- Implement 4 repository classes for data access \(Product, SearchQuery, ProductFilter, MCPServerConfig\)

### Service Layer
- SearchService: Google Custom Search API integration with rate limiting
- AIService: Anthropic Claude SDK for filtering shoppable products, extracting product data, and generating personalized filters
- MCPService: Generic MCP client supporting multiple Model Context Protocol servers
- ProductService: Orchestrates 8-step AI search workflow \(search → filter → extract → combine → deduplicate → save → generate filters\)

### API Layer
- ProductController with 6 endpoints \(aiSearch, getProducts, getProductById, deleteProduct, getSearchHistory, getSearchQueryById\)
- Product routes with JWT authentication and Zod validation
- MCP server configuration system with JSON-based setup

## Mobile App Implementation

### State Management
- ProductContext with comprehensive state \(products, filters, loading, error, pagination\)
- useProduct hook for accessing context
- Integration with existing AuthProvider

### Navigation
- Products tab in bottom navigation
- Nested stack navigator with 3 screens

### Components
- Common components: LoadingSpinner, ErrorMessage
- Product components: ProductCard, SearchBar, FilterChips

### Screens
- ProductSearchScreen: Natural language search input with search history display
- ProductListScreen: Results with AI-generated filters, pull-to-refresh, and pagination
- ProductDetailsScreen: Detailed view with "View on Website" and delete functionality

## Shared Packages
- Add comprehensive type definitions \(Product, SearchQuery, ProductFilter, AISearchRequest, AISearchResponse, etc.\)
- Add AI-specific types \(SearchResult, FilteredResult, ExtractedProductData\)
- Add Zod validation schemas \(aiSearchSchema, productFiltersSchema\)

## Previous Bug Fixes
- Fix inconsistencies: pnpm → yarn, AsyncStorage → react-native-keychain, API URL configuration
- Update documentation to reflect bare React Native architecture

## Features
- 🤖 AI-powered product filtering and extraction using Claude Sonnet 4.5
- 🔍 Real-time Google Search integration
- 🔌 MCP server support for additional product sources
- 🎯 AI-generated personalized filters \(price ranges, brands, categories\)
- 📱 Complete mobile UI with navigation and state management
- 💾 Full database persistence with PostgreSQL
- 🔒 Secure JWT authentication on all endpoints
- ✅ TypeScript type-safety throughout the stack

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add shopping cart and mock payment gateway functionality

Implements a complete shopping cart system with mock payment gateway supporting card payments and PayPal, integrated with the backend and ready for deployment.

## Backend Implementation

### Database Schema \(Migration 003\)
- cart_items table: user_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, price, variants \(JSONB\)
- orders table: user_id, items \(JSONB\), subtotal, tax, total, payment_id, status
- payments table: order_id, user_id, amount, payment_method, status, transaction_id, billing_address

### Shared Types & Validation
- Cart types: CartItem, Cart, ProductVariant, AddToCartRequest, UpdateCartItemRequest
- Payment types: PaymentMethod, PaymentStatus, CardDetails, PayPalDetails, Payment, Order
- Zod validation schemas for cart and payment requests with card number/CVV validation

### Repositories
- CartRepository: CRUD operations for cart items with variant support
- OrderRepository: Create and retrieve orders with pagination
- PaymentRepository: Create and update payment records

### Services
- CartService: Add to cart, update quantity, remove items, calculate totals with tax
- PaymentGatewayService: Mock payment processor with Luhn algorithm validation
  - Card payments: Validates card number, expiry, CVV with 10% simulated failure rate
  - PayPal payments: Email validation with 5% simulated failure rate
  - Generates mock transaction IDs
- PaymentService: Orchestrates checkout flow \(cart → order → payment → clear cart\)

### API Endpoints
Cart routes \(/cart\):
- POST / - Add item to cart
- GET / - Get user''s cart with totals
- PUT /:itemId - Update cart item quantity/variants
- DELETE /:itemId - Remove item from cart
- POST /clear - Clear entire cart

Payment routes \(/payments\):
- POST / - Process payment \(creates order, processes payment, clears cart\)
- GET /orders - Get order history with pagination
- GET /orders/:orderId - Get specific order with payment details

## Features
- Product variants support \(size, color, etc.\) with price modifiers
- Automatic tax calculation \(8%\)
- Cart persistence across sessions
- Payment status tracking \(pending → processing → succeeded/failed\)
- Mock payment gateway with realistic validation and failures
- Order history with pagination
- TypeScript type safety throughout

## Build Fixes
- Fixed pnpm-lock.yaml out of sync error by updating workspace dependencies to use workspace:* protocol

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(do sed -i 's/CREATE INDEX \\\([a-zA-Z0-9_]*\\\)/CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS \\1/g' "$file")

Bash(do sed -i 's/CREATE TRIGGER \\\([a-zA-Z0-9_]*\\\)/DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON users; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON products; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON cart_items; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON orders; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON mandates; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON purchase_intents; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \\1 ON mcp_server_configs;\\nCREATE TRIGGER \\1/g' "$file")
